task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the NOSH EHR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login (likely showing the 'admin' user profile).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for the patient including inactive/archived records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A patient search interface is visible with a query for 'Maria Garcia' and a specific filter, checkbox, or tab selected to include 'Inactive', 'Archived', or 'All' patients, since the record does not appear in standard active searches.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the correct existing patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Search results or a patient chart header explicitly displaying the name 'Maria Garcia' and the Date of Birth '1980-03-25'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the patient's demographics or settings to edit the status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit screen, demographics form, or patient settings page for Maria Garcia is open, displaying fields where the patient's active/inactive status can be modified.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's status was changed to 'Active'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status dropdown, toggle, or radio button for Maria Garcia is visibly set to 'Active', or there is a system success message/notification confirming the patient record has been updated/reactivated.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions should take place within a web browser showing the NOSH interface. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands (e.g., 'UPDATE demographics SET active=1...') or curl requests to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not create a new patient record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should not show the agent filling out a 'New Patient', 'Add Patient', or blank registration form with Maria Garcia's details. The interaction must clearly be editing an existing inactive record.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual NOSH application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show continuous and logical navigation through the NOSH EHR interface, rather than static text editors, manipulated HTML files, or copy-pasted text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Maria Garcia. DOB: 1980-03-25. Credentials: username 'admin', password 'Admin1234!'. The task requires reactivating an existing inactive record in the NOSH ChartingSystem EHR. The agent must NOT create a new patient record.
